productDisplayName: Pink Floyd Men Pink Floyd Grey Sweatshirts
description: Composition Grey hooded sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has full sleeves with ribbed cuffs and a ribbed hem, belly pockets with stitch detailing and print on the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash in warm water with similar colours Do not dry clean Use a non-chlorine bleach if needed Do not iron on print Celebrate the 60's retro era with this soft jersey from bioworld. This cozy sweatshirt Sports a psychedelic cover of pink floyd's best-selling album on its front, zooming you back in time in ease. Pair it with track pants or jeans and jazz up your winter wardrobe. Model statistics The model wears size M in sweatshirts Height: 6', Shoulders: 18
